title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
summary: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
briefing: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
summary: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
briefing: Morpho Midnight introduces fixed rates and defined maturities alongside Morpho Blue’s variable-rate lending markets.

title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
summary: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
briefing: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.

title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms may exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
summary: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms may exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
briefing: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
summary: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
briefing: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

title: Bitcoin price gains to $66.3K as range breakout attempt sparks 1-month high
summary: Bitcoin price gains to $66.3K as range breakout attempt sparks 1-month high
briefing: Bitcoin beat out local resistance to pass $66,000 amid predictions of as much as 6% BTC price upside if momentum continued.

title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
summary: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
briefing: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.

title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
summary: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
briefing: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
summary: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
briefing: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
summary: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
briefing: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

title: Worldcoin’s WLD Jumps 8% on Grayscale ETF Filing
summary: Worldcoin’s WLD Jumps 8% on Grayscale ETF Filing
briefing: The asset manager's S-1 for a spot WLD fund would be the first U.S. ETF tied to Sam Altman's biometric crypto project.

title: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
summary: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
briefing: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
briefing: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
briefing: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
summary: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
briefing: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.
